channel.title: LEETCODE on 艾倫的開發心路歷程
channel.description: Recent content in LEETCODE on 艾倫的開發心路歷程
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2021-{year} Allen Hsieh. All Rights Reserved.

item.title: 演算法 [Java] LeetCode #1119. Remove Vowels from a String
item.description: 題目 Given a string s, remove the vowels ‘a’, ‘e’, ‘i’, ‘o’, and ‘u’ from it, and return the new string. Example 1: 1Input: s = "leetcodeisacommunityforcoders" 2Output: "ltcdscmmntyfrcdrs" Example 2: 1Input: s = "aeiou" 2Output: "" Constraints: 1 <= s.length <= 1000 s consists of only lowercase English letters. 我的思路 由於是將一個 String 中所有的母音都移

item.title: 演算法 [Java] LeetCode #1762. Buildings With an Ocean View
item.description: 題目 There are n buildings in a line. You are given an integer array heights of size n that represents the heights of the buildings in the line. The ocean is to the right of the buildings. A building has an ocean view if the building can see the ocean without obstructions. Formally, a building has an ocean view if all the buildings to its right have a smaller
